log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader or overlay, with a small size. Investigate the available sandboxes to see if there are any commonalities in the results.
The CAPA sandbox has some results, but they are limited to signature matches and MITRE ATT&CK techniques. Investigate the network activity to see if there are any interesting connections.
The sample communicates with two suspicious domains (partners-gs.com and tmupi.com) over HTTPS, and also makes a DNS lookup for these domains. Investigate the registry changes to see if there are any

There are no persistence keys found in the registry, which suggests that the malware might not be using a traditional registry-based persistence mechanism. Investigate the dropped files to see if ther
The malware drops two files, lasma.exe and another copy of lasma.exe in the temp directory. Investigate the process activity to see if there are any interesting processes spawned or modules loaded.
